title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Yatra Capital India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Yatra Capital India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Yatra Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Bhopal-based team.

About Yatra Capital India:
Yatra Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
